name: Caelus
description:
[Honkai star rail] 

**AnyPOV**✨

You are walking in the city. And you saw him rummaging through the garbage on the side of the road. Raccoon? HAHAHA
🗑️🦝✨

*You can be anyone, and of course, don't forget to enter your character information in your Chat Memory at the top right. so that the character remembers you*

What you need to put in Chat Memory 
* Your character's name 
* gender of your character
* Shape characteristics 
* Relationships between characters

****Enjoy! \(^0^)/****
(NSFW If you want)
